clean_protocol_gate.boundary: The cv2-readable 2770 run can be prepared as a candidate coverage run after explicit approval, but a reviewed clean full-pool protocol remains blocked until manual review is complete.

prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before long run; the external full algae image pool is not accessible.

prerequisites.requirement: cv2-readable candidate manifest exists with 2770 unique rows
prerequisites.evidence: `metrics/manifests/full_algae_dewatermark_v1_cv2_readable_candidate.txt`; raw=2770; unique=2770; duplicates=0; first=1、Akashiwo sanguinea-血红哈卡藻/0012_Akashiwo-sanguinea.jpg; last=9、Gymnodinium catenatum-链状裸甲藻/vera_veloso_gymnodinium_catenatum_cruz_xxw_20070621133158_small.jpg
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before long run; rebuild or inspect the manifest.

prerequisites.requirement: Decode audit supports the cv2-readable candidate split
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before long run; decode audit and manifest counts disagree.

prerequisites.requirement: Locked final mainline config and resumable run script are present and aligned
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before long run; the run script must explicitly pass the locked config and candidate manifest.
Stop before 2770 run; rerun or inspect smoke if completeness is not true.

prerequisites.requirement: Budget, summarizer and intake scripts are present
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before long run; post-run intake must be available before execution.

prerequisites.requirement: Full2770 output root is not started
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop and inspect existing outputs before starting or resuming the run.

prerequisites.requirement: Minimum disk-space recommendation is currently met
prerequisites.blocking_if_failed: Stop before long run or free space; expected output is about 3.04 GiB plus logs/future artifacts.

future_execution_sequence.title: Optional read-only preflight refresh
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: Updated intake status remains not_started before execution.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: If output root exists unexpectedly, stop and inspect before running main.py.

future_execution_sequence.title: Run Stage1 cv2-readable 2770 candidate full run
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: full2770_locked_final_mainline output root, logs/full2770_locked_final_mainline.log, six stages x JPG/PNG outputs.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Requires explicit user authorization; stop if free disk is below 5 GiB or the planned output root already contains mixed outputs.

future_execution_sequence.title: Read-only post-run intake
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: Intake status reaches core_outputs_complete or complete_with_log_and_run_report.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Do not write completion claims while status is not_started or incomplete_or_in_progress.

future_execution_sequence.title: Write run_report only after core outputs are complete
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: output_dir/run_report.md exists and intake status reaches complete_with_log_and_run_report.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: The intake script refuses to write run_report unless core outputs are complete.

future_execution_sequence.title: Decide whether to promote any full-pool evidence
future_execution_sequence.command: manual review plus document update; no command
future_execution_sequence.expected_evidence: README/status/research-state/research-log updated only after intake and human review.
future_execution_sequence.stop_rule: Do not replace full502_clean_v1 or compare9_complete496_v1 without a separately accepted protocol.

acceptance_criteria: Manifest raw and unique rows are exactly 2770.
Run command explicitly passes locked_full506_final_mainline.json and full_algae_dewatermark_v1_cv2_readable_candidate.txt.
Each of six stages has 2770 JPG and 2770 PNG outputs, for 33240 files total.
Final PNG decode sample succeeds after post-run intake.
run_report.md is generated only after core outputs are complete.
State docs and research-log are updated only after intake proves completion.
paper_boundaries: Current status can only be written as candidate full2770 ready after explicit approval, not executed.
The four GIF89a-content files remain outside the cv2-readable run unless converted through a separate reviewed decision.
Manual review still blocks a reviewed clean full-pool manifest.
Full2770 coverage evidence does not replace the current formal full502_clean_v1 and compare9_complete496_v1 paper result protocols.
Full2770 enhancement outputs alone do not prove downstream edge gains; MyEdge GT validation is still required.
hard_stops: Do not run the full2770 PowerShell script without explicit user authorization.
Do not use the candidate cv2-readable run as a reviewed clean manifest.
Do not claim 2770 completion before intake reaches complete_with_log_and_run_report.
Do not overwrite current formal 502/496 result directories.
